tasks.title: Add plan validations
tasks.split_reason: Original FE spec (~33K tokens) caused context exhaustion. Split into 4 sequential FE parts with human checkpoints. Plan Library (Trigger 2) extracted to FE-D due to complex multi-plan 3-step flow.

checks.desc: active-renewal-info endpoint: activeRenewalByLoc correctness, backward compat, serialization (5 integration tests)
validate-renewal-fields endpoint (4 unit tests) + PlanSyncValidationService (22 unit tests)

Tier 2 MSW-powered scenarios: priority chain (form→renewal→sync), LOC reset skip, stepper modal flow, Go Back navigation, API error fallback
Human verified: wired-up flows work in sequence — right modal at right trigger, priority chain correct, Clone button dynamic re-enable (PM-2), stepper modal (PM-4)
New medical plan with missing premiums → MissingRenewalFieldsModal → RatesEnrollmentModal → save succeeds
New vision plan (LOC reset) with missing premiums → no validation, save proceeds normally
New Basic Life plan with missing volume/rate → MissingRenewalFieldsModal with LAD fields
Plan Library add multiple medical plans → sequential stepper modal (one plan at a time)
Edit existing plan, add new BC → RatesEnrollmentModal with BC collapsible sections
Clone plan to year with active renewal → warning + disabled button; switch to year without renewal → re-enabled
Benefit Guide clone during active renewal → CloneUnavailableModal
Change effective date to year with active renewal → MissingRenewalFieldsModal
Human verified: all 8 E2E scenarios pass on running system with seed data (TechCorp employer with active renewal)

tasks.title: {Replaced} BC sync triggers — decomposed into PY-12692/12693/12694
tasks.notes: Original story refused by gap-check (complexity 810). PM split into 3 children: PY-12692 (popup + finalized guard), PY-12693 (SG sync behavior), PY-12694 (LG sync behavior). Gap reports + decisions live in epics/sr-ts-bc/task-specs/phase-2/PY-12414-bc-sync-triggers/ and the 3 child directories.

tasks.title: Auto Sync: Updating Benefit Classes on a System Plan
tasks.notes: Replaces part of PY-12414 (popup + trigger + finalized-proposal block). Branches from task/PY-12388-be (Option B) to share ActiveRenewalInfoVO extension. Ships generalized FinalizedProposalGuard hook reused by PY-12391. Decisions B1/B2/B3 resolved — see decisions.md. Spec context at spec-context.md (on spec/PY-12692-bc-trigger-popup branch).

tasks.title: Small Group: How Benefit Classes Changes Sync to Renewal
tasks.notes: Replaces part of PY-12414 (SG MEDICAL only — NYVT auto-Ideon refresh + Non-NYVT census banner). Wires BC change into existing SystemPlanSyncService.triggerIdeonReRunIfNeeded path — no new Ideon plumbing. Banner is content variant of PY-12389 shell (depends on it for shell). Decisions B1/B2/PM-G/PM-C resolved — see decisions.md. Unassigned — anyone can pick up.

tasks.title: Large Group: Updating Offers and Proposals with Benefit Classes Changes
tasks.notes: Replaces part of PY-12414 (LG MDV — offer enrollment update + proposal exploded-row add/remove). Path (a) chosen for B1 — exploded model only, no Same/Different mode UX (deferred to Phase 5/6 BC-02/05/06/08). Banner is content variant of PY-12389 shell. Decisions B1/B2/W6 resolved — see decisions.md. Unassigned — anyone can pick up.

checks.desc: Step 1: RenewalInfoVO.tierType populated correctly per benefitCategory (3 unit tests)

Step 2b: Batch alignment API - all plans updated atomically, renewal tier synced (4 unit + 2 integration tests)

Step 3: Consumer deserializes event, template renders, SES mocked (3 tests)
Step 4: Document extraction tier defaulting (4 unit tests)

3 Storybook stories load without errors: TierReviewMismatched, TierReviewAllAligned, TierReviewAfterEdit. Elements match spec (tier tags, buttons, data-testid values).

Human checkpoint: 3 pixel-diff comparisons (Figma vs Storybook). Gate 2.1: mismatched state vs 118338:36024. Gate 2.2: aligned state vs 118338:36024. Gate 2.3: edit state vs 118338:36087. Approve visual fidelity.
